title: Red Elytra
description: A simple red elytra to revamp the vanilla one!
body: This is just a simple red elytra reskin I made to revamp the regular vanilla one. Please note it is best to not have a cape on when using this, I tested it very little with cape mods and I believe it will not work with a cape, due to Minecraft making your cape skin match your elytra.  Please enjoy and let me know if you would like it in different versions or maybe even different colors! Thank you for the support!
